name: aria-probe
description: Validation probe for aria-cowork. Tests whether a Cowork plugin can read and write the user-attached knowledge folder, verifies bidirectional access with aria-knowledge in Code, and (v0.2.0) tests whether Cowork can read the existing aria-knowledge config at ~/.claude/aria-knowledge.local.md when ~/.claude/ is attached as an additional workspace folder. Install once, run /aria-probe, uninstall.
